content_body: We enjoyed our stay at Cohutta Sunset despite the rain. We made memories roasting marshmallows and hot dogs, playing pool, spending time in the hot tub, and even hiking between the showers. We can't wait to come back and actually get to see a sunset. The views up in the clouds were amazing and we enjoyed the sounds of rain on the tin roof. A little rain can't stop us from enjoying our time in the mountains! Happy 15th anniversary to us and many more!
title: An Enjoyable Time In the Mountains
